overall.description: A first-person walk through a concrete urban underpass in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring fluorescent lighting, a large illuminated travel billboard, and transitioning from artificial tunnel lighting to bright daylight at the highway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete pedestrian underpass with fluorescent tube lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the underpass toward the distant exit light

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete wall with vertical seams and weather stains
horizontal triple-tube fluorescent fixtures mounted on the left wall
large cylindrical metal ventilation pipe running along the ceiling
bright white daylight visible at the far end of the tunnel
gray concrete pedestrian walkway with yellow safety line
asphalt road lane for vehicles running parallel to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady walk through a dimly lit concrete underpass. Yellow fluorescent tubes line the left wall while a large ventilation duct runs overhead. The tunnel extends straight ahead toward a bright exit in the distance, with the sidewalk and adjacent road visible but empty of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass wall with large illuminated advertisement

events.description: large illuminated travel billboard becomes visible on the left wall

agents.ego_description: passing the illuminated billboard while maintaining steady forward movement through the tunnel

entered.detail: large backlit advertisement poster for Sunny Somalia vacation destination showing 15% off promotion

segments.scene_description: Walking past a prominent illuminated billboard advertising Sunny Somalia travel deals mounted on the left tunnel wall. The fluorescent lights and concrete wall recede to the left as the camera passes the advertisement, continuing the steady forward progression through the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit transition with increasing daylight

events.description: natural daylight intensifies as the tunnel exit approaches, creating high contrast with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching the tunnel exit where bright daylight becomes increasingly dominant

entered.detail: blue-painted concrete sound barrier wall visible through the tunnel exit on the right side
modern curved street lamp post visible near the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The tunnel opens up as the exit approaches, with natural daylight flooding in and overwhelming the artificial fluorescent lighting. The illuminated billboard is now behind as blue concrete walls and street furniture of the outside world become visible through the tunnel mouth ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway exit with multi-lane road

events.description: exits the underpass into bright daylight urban highway environment

agents.ego_description: emerging from the tunnel onto the sidewalk next to a multi-lane urban highway

notable_agents.action: black van driving past on the adjacent highway lane

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road with moving traffic under clear blue sky
bright blue sky with scattered white clouds visible overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the tunnel into bright midday sunlight, revealing an urban highway scene. The enclosed concrete walls give way to open sky and a multi-lane road where vehicles including a black van are visible driving past on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dimly lit concrete underpass that gradually opens into a bright, sun-drenched urban highway. It begins with a steady walk past yellow fluorescent tubes and overhead ventilation ducts, moving along an empty sidewalk toward a distant light. As the camera progresses, it passes a prominent illuminated billboard advertising Sunny Somalia travel deals before the artificial lighting begins to fade. The scene then expands as the tunnel mouth approaches, with natural daylight flooding in to overwhelm the fluorescent glow and reveal blue concrete walls. Finally, the camera emerges fully into the midday sun, where the enclosed walls give way to an open sky and a multi-lane road with vehicles driving past.
